title: Domino's Is Ready For Driverless Future, But Future Isn't Ready Yet
text: After experimenting a few years ago with an autonomously controlled Ford Fusion delivery vehicle, the fast-food leader based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, has backed away for now from further experimentation with driverless delivery vehicles.

title: Domino's Sees 13% Pickup Growth as Delivery Dips Amid Inflation
text: Domino's pickup sales rise and delivery falls as consumers seek affordable restaurant options amid inflation. In recent years, the pizza quick-service restaurant (QSR) giant has been looking to encourage adoption of pickup to both save on labor costs internally and engage consumers who might otherwise be put off by the high cost of delivery.

title: Domino's (DPZ) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Stock Gains
text: Domino's (DPZ) first-quarter fiscal 2023 results gain from robust U.S and international same-store sales.

title: Why Domino's Stock Dropped on Thursday
text: Domino's growth in Q1 lagged competitors in the fast food space. The chain boosted its profitability, but market share challenges remain.

title: Domino's Pizza beats profit estimate but falls slightly shy of revenue view
text: Domino's Pizza Inc. DPZ stock is up 1% in premarket trades after the pizza maker topped first-quarter earnings and fell just shy of its revenue forecast from analysts. Domino's said its first-quarter profit climbed 10% to $104.8 million, or $2.93 a share, ahead of the analyst estimate of $2.72 a share, according to estimates compiled by FactSet.

title: Better Buy: Starbucks vs. Domino's Pizza
text: Starbucks is poised for a post-pandemic recovery as China ends its lockdowns and the U.S. warms up again. Domino's Pizza is facing tough comparisons to its pandemic-era growth spurt as well as inflationary headwinds.

title: Restaurants' Positive Earnings Could Mask Rough Year Ahead
text: When America's fast-food giants report earnings in the coming days, it should be good news. It also could be the last good news these companies have for some time.

title: Don't Wait for a Market Crash: These 2 Top Stocks Are on Sale
text: Domino's has a long-term opportunity to grow profits, increase earnings per share, and pay dividends, which will benefit investors. Wex's business had a record year in 2022, but management still sees growth ahead.

title: Expecting a Tax Refund? Here Are 2 Remarkable Dividend Growth Stocks to Consider
text: Humana and Domino's Pizza each have solid growth prospects. The two companies pay well-covered and growing dividends.

title: Top Wall Street analysts say buy these stocks amid the latest macroeconomic uncertainty
text: TipRanks analyst ranking service pinpoints Wall Street's best-performing stocks, including CrowdStrike and Costco

title: 3 Magnificent Dividend Stocks Down More Than 40% That Are Downright Cheap Right Now
text: Sales may be slightly slumping, but Domino's is still taking market share. Williams-Sonoma is poised to take advantage of its cheap stock price with a monstrous buyback program.

title: U.S. Wide-Moat Stocks On Sale - The April 2023 Heat Map
text: Our 3-step process focuses on wide-moat stocks (as per Morningstar's rating). We are only interested in those targets that are attractively valued in historical comparison.

title: These Restaurant Stocks Defy Inflation, Recession Concerns
text: Despite inflation and the constant and ever-changing threat of an economic downturn (a few weeks ago it was bank failures, this week it's rising gas prices), restaurant chains including Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc. (NYSE: CMG), Wingstop Inc. (NASDAQ: WING) and Yum Brands Inc. (NYSE: YUM) continue to outperform. Those three stocks are nearing possible buy points.

title: My Top 15 High-Growth Dividend Stocks For April 2023
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of April. The watchlist posted a gain of 2.02% in March, finishing ahead of VIG but trailing SPY.
